# BP-98 positive variant: OpenFile result is not released
lang: go
file: BP-98-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "os"

func writeConfig(path string, data []byte) error {
	f, err := os.OpenFile(path, os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY, 0600)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	_, err = f.Write(data)
	return err
}
